summary: Backend testing of 7 code changes in InterFitAI. All 7 changes verified: GIF IDs corrected, conditioning patterns updated, bodyweight horizontal pull fixed, _slot_importance priority for hybrid/functional conditioning fixed. 19/20 tests passed (1 skipped - skull crusher not generated in LLM call, static mapping confirmed separately).

minor.issue: Duplicate 'jump rope' key in Python dict (line 633 maps to '2612', line 744 maps to '1160'). In Python, last key wins so 'jump rope' → '1160' overrides the original '2612' mapping. This may be intentional per review request (change 6: 'jump rope 1160 added') but the old entry at line 633 is now dead code.

action_items: MINOR (optional): Remove the duplicate 'jump rope': '2612' entry at line 633 of server.py since it is overridden by line 744 ('1160'). Confirm which ID is correct for jump rope GIF.
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate dict key 'jump rope' at lines 633 (2612) and 744 (1160). Python silently takes last value (1160). Line 633 entry is dead code. Verify 1160 is the correct jump rope GIF — if so, remove line 633.

success_rate.backend: 19/20 tests passed (95%); 1 skipped (skull crusher not generated by LLM in session — static mapping confirmed separately via TestStaticCodeVerification)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b
